titles.en: To the people of Kufa after the victory of Basra
To the people of Kufa after the victory of Basra

segments: ومن كتاب له (عليه السلام) إليهم بعد فتح البصرة
arabic.text: ومن كتاب له (عليه السلام) إليهم بعد فتح البصرة

segments: Written to the people of Kūfah after the victory of Baṣrah
en.sayed-ali-raza.text: Written to the people of Kūfah after the victory of Baṣrah

titles.en: To the people of Kufa after the victory of Basra

segments: وَجَزَاكُمُ اللهُ مِنْ أَهْلِ مِصْر عَنْ أَهْلِ بَيْتِ نَبِيِّكُمْ أَحْسَنَ مَا يَجْزِي الْعَامِلِينَ بِطَاعَتِهِ، وَالشَّاكِرِينَ لِنِعْمَتِهِ، فَقَدْ سَمِعْتُمْ وَأَطَعْتُمْ، وَدُعِيتُمْ فَأَجَبْتُمْ.
arabic.text: وَجَزَاكُمُ اللهُ مِنْ أَهْلِ مِصْر عَنْ أَهْلِ بَيْتِ نَبِيِّكُمْ أَحْسَنَ مَا يَجْزِي الْعَامِلِينَ بِطَاعَتِهِ، وَالشَّاكِرِينَ لِنِعْمَتِهِ، فَقَدْ سَمِعْتُمْ وَأَطَعْتُمْ، وَدُعِيتُمْ فَأَجَبْتُمْ.

segments: May Allāh reward you, townsmen (of Kūfah), on behalf of a member of your Prophet’s family, with the best reward that He bestows on those who act in obedience to Him, and on those who thank Him for His bounties. Surely, you heard (me) and obeyed, and when you were called you promptly responded.
en.sayed-ali-raza.text: May Allāh reward you, townsmen (of Kūfah), on behalf of a member of your Prophet’s family, with the best reward that He bestows on those who act in obedience to Him, and on those who thank Him for His bounties. Surely, you heard (me) and obeyed, and when you were called you promptly responded.
